description: This file defines a Spring Data JPA repository interface for managing LoanApplicationDraft entities, including methods for fetching drafts by ID and User ID.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraftRepository
classes.description: Repository interface for LoanApplicationDraft entities, extending Spring Data JPA repository functionalities.

methods.name: findByIdAndUserId
methods.description: Finds a LoanApplicationDraft optional by its ID and associated User ID.

methods.name: findAllByUserIdOrderByUpdatedAtDesc
methods.description: Retrieves all LoanApplicationDrafts for a given User ID, ordered by last updated time descending.
